title: Different Double Slabs
description:
Double-slab blocks receive a different look from their full-block counterparts!
Compatible with ALL texture packs!
body:
# Compatible with ALL texture packs!
Because this resource pack only changes the block models instead of textures, it is compatible with all texture packs, even higher-resolution ones!

## What is this pack?
This resource pack changes the models of double-slab blocks to make them look different from their full-block variants.
Take these oak planks and slabs as an example:
![An example displaying the difference between a block and a double-slab block](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TveL3cR9/images/c01eac9d02dd6c70faf7d4800a4a958831b59c5e.png)

As you can see, these changes allow for more variation in builds without compromising on losing other textures or requiring mods.

## What are the changes?
For most variants, the models were rotated by 90°. (Slab variants on top, full blocks below*)
![In-game image of said blocks, slab variants on top, full blocks below](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TveL3cR9/images/7d282a1cd3a4062cfcebd9eacae734aa11163da8.png)
*1.21's blocks are not shown but are included in the resource pack.

However, some slabs have different changes to provide more utility. For example, the sandstone and red sandstone slabs will display their bottom texture on all sides. See below:

![An isometric image of sandstone & red sandstone slab variants](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TveL3cR9/images/12c5b2887bb4b38bff2597ae8f234d09558f9d69.png)

Another exception is the cut sandstone and cut red sandstone slabs. The sides of the model have been changed to include a seam in the middle, matching the (unchanged) smooth stone slabs, as they're—uniquely—the only double slab variant with a different texture in the vanilla game.

![An isometric image of cut sandstone and cut red sandstone next to smooth stone](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TveL3cR9/images/149a4ab7b4b8ddf67e8db253f7b2f47b59a84170.png)

> *Note that the changes to the cut sandstone and cut red sandstone slabs impact their single-slab variants so that the models match their double variant. It's still compatible with other packs, though.

Finally, the bamboo mosaic variant is mirrored instead of rotated 90° because otherwise, it's almost impossible to tell the difference.

![An isometric image of bamboo mosaic](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TveL3cR9/images/6bb653197b775cfab04f7787ce1ffb766e2cdefa.png)
